transcript.clean_text: two years ago the tour de france was supposed to arrive in tina a supposedly once in a generation event weather-wise put paid to that a once-in-a-generation bike performance saw today start the ninth stage in the yellow jersey his first air defense would see 145 kilometers between clues and tina some epic climbs along the way col dupre cormedo roslan and then the 21 kilometer climb the longest of this tour de france all the way to 2100 meters the weather was poor again but this time there'd be all sorts of action on the road going all the way to the finish line while paul's was the first to light up the day he'd be going and fighting for points in the king of the mountains jersey with naido quintana over 40 riders were up the road at this point they'd soon settle on six at the front quintana already trying to make it more selective with 65 kilometers to go quintana took points in the king of the mountains jersey and eventually the polka dot jersey itself he'd find himself as part of a trio leading the race ben o'connor of ashidasir alongside sergio aguita with him meanwhile a good eight and a half minutes back there was a danger that tadepo gacha could lose the yellow jersey that's because o'connor had started the day at 8 minutes and 13 seconds uaa emirates seemed very content to work to try and keep their boss in the yellow but only after a very worrying moment for brandon mcnulty under the final climb of the day quintana was the first to be dropped o'connor would then attack igita in trouble pogaccia are ready for action igita would be dropped and with 17 kilometers still to ride to the line ben o'connor was going in search of a stage when an unlikely stint in the yellow jersey that is until ineos grenadiers managed to go to work togatcha by this point isolated they brought the gap down however o'connor was no longer a yellow jersey danger catapult attacked he was brought back pogaccha went and just like the day before they wouldn't see him again the slovenian looking like he was on another planet nobody able to be near him and even more the yellow jersey leader at the end of the day for ben o'connor all the way from perth in australia he arrived in the alps and became a tour de france stage winner he'd also move up into second place in the general classification a 20th stage victory down the years for azure citroen in the meantime vingo and kelderman struggling to hold on half a minute up the road today pogacha was adding more time to his tour de france lead and at the end of a fascinating intriguing and entertaining first week they'd all be fighting for everything they could have calapas came across the line kelderman losing a little bit gordo also left behind the day belonged to ben o'connor and ajido citroen he'd win by five minutes over his nearest rival cathagno in second colbrelli in third place taking points in the green jersey classification day two in the yellow jersey of this particular tour de france the defending champion just 22 years of age looking like he was practicing a different sport his lead two minutes one second over o'connor five eighteen over udaan a long way back to de vingagor and carapaz making up the top five gordu now 10th at 7 minutes and 22 seconds we're on the end of the first week naido quintana is in the polkadot jersey however the change of the day seeing quintana target a new competition after a rest day in tina the peloton will then head back onto their bikes and head back down into the valley nine stages in will anybody be able to put terepogacha in trouble we'll find out when the tour de france resumes on tuesday you
